description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Golang Lint and Unit Test that runs on pull requests to specific branches and paths, and can be triggered manually. The workflow has two jobs: Lint and Test, both running on ubuntu-latest. The Lint job checks out the code, sets up Go 1.18, and runs golangci-lint-action. The Test job checks out the code, sets up Go 1.18, and compiles the code in the pegic directory using make.
